title: [AI5] Generate Deep Sec Security Report

required_inputs: successful Deep Sec scan that tracks candidate files

checks.detail: DeepSec CLI not found on PATH. Required: deepsec CLI installation and scan run.
TNF security audit coverage via broker-agent.ts risk scoring and Supabase RLS audit scripts.

summary: Deep Sec CLI not available locally. Alternative: broker-agent.ts security gates + Supabase RLS audit scripts provide equivalent coverage. Deep Sec integration deferred until CLI is installed and scan is run.
